content:
I've been quite busy in real life, but in the next week or so I plan to update the guide with:

- Some Arc 2 Chapter 3 details (Note: Uvhash is really bad for this chapter honestly, it's probably best to play them as if they're Doresain from Temu using an Exalt damage focus, which is pretty sad but... it's doable, I'll still finish the rest of it up)
- Cleaning up Arc 1 info a bit which was rushed, adding some earlygame disclaimers
- Posse recommendations
- A little bit of Caro Aequor info (not really full but a few awakener recommendations)

Hope it helps, will bump when it's updated ^^
thread_title: An Uvhash Guide to Dealing Death and (perhaps) not Receiving It in Kind
